DYEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS UNTIMELY UNDER CCP 473(B), IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY 473(B), AND DOES NOT SHOW LACK OF EFFECTIVE SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS.
